name: Golf Game
about: Golf Game is an indoor golf facility operating year-round with 24/7 access. The venue features two state-of-the-art TrackMan iO simulators, providing a platform for practice, playing world-class courses, or social play. Booking is managed through YourGolfBookings services, and membership options are available that grant access to a set number of simulator hours per month. The facility is located at 13510 NE 84th Street in Vancouver, WA, and is known for its quiet, focused environment and convenient location near Padden Parkway with ample parking. Members and guests are required to bring their own golf clubs.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan iO simulator technology for accurate data and immersive experience
24/7 access provides ultimate flexibility for any schedule
Quiet, focused environment ideal for serious practice and game improvement
Easy online booking system and a straightforward membership model

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food or kitchen services are mentioned.
No alcohol service is mentioned; BYOB is not indicated.

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art radar launch monitor simulator system.
